output.answer: Based on the queries executed against Wikidata, no games between the Los Angeles Dodgers (Q20263) and Philadelphia Phillies (Q150508) in the National League Championship Series (Q2496616) with recorded attendance data were found. Wikidata may not contain this specific historical attendance information for playoff games between these teams.
output.formatted:
Based on the queries executed against Wikidata, no games between the Los Angeles Dodgers (Q20263) and Philadelphia Phillies (Q150508) in the National League Championship Series (Q2496616) with recorded attendance data were found. Wikidata may not contain this specific historical attendance information for playoff games between these teams.

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?game ?attendance WHERE {
  ?game wdt:P1347 ?series .
  ?series wdt:P31 wd:Q2496616 .
  {
    ?game wdt:P1545 wd:Q20263 ; wdt:P1546 wd:Q150508
  } UNION {
    ?game wdt:P1545 wd:Q150508 ; wdt:P1546 wd:Q20263
  }
  .
  ?game wdt:P532 ?attendance .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?attendance)
LIMIT 1
```

Got no rows and 2 columns
